subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent forth 'Alí with the truth, that he might bring unto men the glad-tidings of this Most Great Revelation, whereby all who dwell on earth were thunderstruck [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ارسلنا علیا بالحق لیبشر الناس بهذا الظهور الاعظم الذی به انصعق من فی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
